english translation text: Na Kalim Ka Tasawwar – Na Khayale Toor Sina Neither An Imagination Of The Prophet - Nor The Thought Of Mount Sinai
Meri Arzoo Mohammad – Meri Jus Taju Madina My Desire Is Mohammed - My Hope Is Madina

May Ghulame Mustafa Hun – Meri Azmatay Na Pucho I Am The Servant Of Mustafa - Ask Not About My GreatnessMuje Dekh Kar Jahannam – Ko Bhi Aa Gaya PasinaFor Upon My Sight, The Fires Of Hell Itself Subside

Muje Dushmano Na Chero – Mera Hay Koi Jahan MeO Enemies! Do Not Bully Me - I Have Someone In This WorldMay Abhi Pukar Loonga – Nahi Duur Hay MadinaI Can Call (Upon Him) Straightaway - For Madina Is Not Far
May Marize Mustafa Hun – Muje Chedo Na TabiboI Am The Patient Of Mustafa - Do Not Bother Me DoctorsMeri Zindagi Jo Chaho, Chaho  – Muje Le Chalo MadinaIf You Wish Me Longevity, Take Me To Madina
Mere Doobne Me Baki – Na Koi Kasar RahithiThere Was No Doubt That I Would Sink Kahan Al Madad Muhammad– To Ubhar Gaya SafinaBut When I Said "Al-madad Muhammad" - My Ark Was Bouyant Again
Siwa Iske Mere Dilme – Koi Arzoo Nahi HayI Harbour No Desire In My Heart Other ThanMuje Mowt Bhi Jo Aaye, Aaye – To Ho Samne MadinaThat When Death Comes Upon Me - It So Happens In Madina

Kabhi Ay Ghulam Dilse – Na Mite Khayale AhmadNever From Your Heart, O Slave, Be The Thought Of Ahmad ErasedIsi Arzoo Me Jina, Jina - Isi Arzoo Me MarnaLive With This Desire, And Die With This Desire
